title: scutellaria poliochlora
intro: Scutellaria poliochlora, also known as the alpine skullcap, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Japan and Korea. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Scutellaria poliochlora are attributed to its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Scutellaria poliochlora can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
